2605.22786.title: LCGuard: Latent Communication Guard for Safe KV Sharing in Multi-Agent Systems
2605.22786.paper_summary: Large language model (LLM)-based multi-agent systems increasingly rely on intermediate communication to coordinate complex tasks. While most existing systems communicate through natural language, recent work shows that latent communication, particularly through transformer key-value (KV) caches, can improve efficiency and preserve richer task-relevant information. However, KV caches also encode contextual inputs, intermediate reasoning states, and agent-specific information, creating an opaque channel through which sensitive content may propagate across agents without explicit textual disclosure. To address this, we introduce \textbf{LCGuard} (Latent Communication Guard), a framework for safe KV-based latent communication in multi-agent LLM systems. LCGuard treats shared KV caches as latent working memory and learns representation-level transformations before cache artifacts are transmitted across agents. We formalize representation-level sensitive information leakage operationally through reconstruction: a shared cache artifact is unsafe if an adversarial decoder can recover agent-specific sensitive inputs from it. This leads to an adversarial training formulation in which the adversary learns to reconstruct sensitive inputs, while LCGuard learns transformations that preserve task-relevant semantics and reduce reconstructable information. Empirical evaluations across multiple model families and multi-agent benchmarks show that LCGuard consistently reduces reconstruction-based leakage and attack success rates while maintaining competitive task performance compared to standard KV-sharing baselines.
2605.22786.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）基礎的多代理系統越來越依賴中介通信來協調複雜任務。<lb/>雖然大多數現有系統通過自然語言進行通信，但最近的研究顯示，潛在通信，特別是通過Transformer鍵值（KV）快取，可以提高效率並保留更豐富的任務相關信息。<lb/>然而，KV快取還編碼了上下文輸入、中介推理狀態和代理特定信息，創造了一個不透明的通道，通過該通道，敏感內容可能在代理之間傳播而無需明確的文本披露。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們介紹了\textbf{LCGuard}（潛在通信保護），這是一個在多代理LLM系統中進行安全KV基礎潛在通信的框架。<lb/>LCGuard將共享的KV快取視為潛在工作記憶，並在快取工件被傳輸到代理之間之前學習表示層級的轉換。<lb/>我們通過重建形式化表示層級的敏感信息洩漏：如果對手解碼器能夠從共享的快取工件中恢復代理特定的敏感輸入，則該共享快取工件是不安全的。<lb/>這導致了一種對抗訓練的公式，其中對手學習重建敏感輸入，而LCGuard學習保留任務相關語義並減少可重建信息的轉換。<lb/>在多個模型系列和多代理基準上的實證評估顯示，LCGuard始終減少基於重建的洩漏和攻擊成功率，同時與標準KV共享基準相比，保持競爭性的任務性能。
2605.22786.author: Sadia Asif et.al.
2605.22786.authors: Sadia Asif, Mohammad Mohammadi Amiri, Momin Abbas, Prasanna Sattigeri, Karthikeyan Natesan Ramamurthy
